nasb.text: For those who are according to the flesh set their minds on the things of the flesh, but those who are according to the Spirit, the things of the Spirit.

esv.text: For those who live according to the flesh set their minds on the things of the flesh, but those who live according to the Spirit set their minds on the things of the Spirit.

cnv.text: 隨從肉體的人，以肉體的事為念；隨從聖靈的人，以聖靈的事為念。

ccb.text: 随从罪恶本性的人顾念罪恶本性的事，但随从圣灵的人顾念圣灵的事。

csbs.text: 要知道，顺着肉体的人，思想属肉体的事；顺着圣灵的人，思想属圣灵的事。
